title: The Weirdest Face in Nature Is the Fastest Eater Alive
script: This might be the strangest face in the animal kingdom, and it belongs to the fastest eater on Earth. It's the star-nosed mole. That pink star on its face is made of twenty-two feelers with over a hundred thousand nerve endings, more touch sensors than your entire hand. It's nearly blind, but it can find, identify, and swallow a piece of food in under two tenths of a second, faster than your eye can even follow. It maps the world entirely by touch, in total darkness underground. So how does a brain process anything that fast?
